title: FDA Approves Orca Bio's Tregzi Cell Therapy
headline: FDA approves Orca Bio's allogeneic regulatory T cell therapy Tregzi for improving survival free of chronic graft-versus-host disease in adult hematological malignancy stem cell transplants.
key_facts: FDA approval July 1, 2026; first-in-class Treg-based immunotherapy for chronic GVHD in stem cell transplants; Orca Bio currently private

title: Merck Terminates MK-1167 Alzheimer's Phase 2
headline: Merck halts development of oral Alzheimer's drug MK-1167 from partner Neuphoria Therapeutics after Phase 2 interim analysis missed efficacy criteria, with MRK stock down 2.44% and NEUP down 18.76%.
key_facts: Phase 2 termination July 1, 2026; MK-1167 oral small molecule; MRK -2.44%, NEUP -18.76%; partner Neuphoria Therapeutics

title: BridgeBio Secures $1B from Sixth Street & KKR
headline: BridgeBio Pharma secures up to $1 billion in non-dilutive financing from Sixth Street and KKR to support three upcoming drug launches.
key_facts: $1 billion financing; investors Sixth Street and KKR; three upcoming drug launches; announced July 1, 2026

title: Ipsen Acquires Memo Therapeutics for $800M
headline: Ipsen announces acquisition of Swiss biotech Memo Therapeutics, focused on kidney infection therapeutics, for up to $800 million.
key_facts: $800 million deal value; Memo Therapeutics target; kidney infection focus; second Ipsen deal in days (Kartos $1.75B on June 30); total ~$2.55B potential deal value

title: FDA Warning for Sanofi Genzyme Altuviiio Plant
headline: FDA issues warning to Sanofi's Genzyme manufacturing facility in Ireland over quality concerns related to Altuviiio hemophilia A factor VIII therapy production.
key_facts: FDA warning July 1, 2026; Genzyme Irish facility; Altuviiio (hemophilia A factor VIII replacement); quality issues identified

title: Senior FDA Gene/Cell Therapy Regulator Departs
headline: Vijay Kumar, top FDA official overseeing gene and cell therapy regulation, announces departure, following earlier exit of CBER chief Peter Marks.
key_facts: Vijay Kumar stepping down; senior FDA gene and cell therapy regulator; follows Peter Marks CBER departure; regulatory continuity concerns raised

title: Lonza Expands ADC Manufacturing Capacity
headline: Lonza announces antibody-drug conjugate manufacturing capacity expansion and broadened collaboration with unnamed U.S. drugmaker.
key_facts: ADC capacity expansion; U.S. drugmaker partnership broadening; announced July 1, 2026

title: WuXi AppTec Seeks Injunction on China Military List
headline: WuXi AppTec pursues legal injunction after placement on China military-related list triggers customer relationship suspensions.
key_facts: WuXi AppTec legal injunction filed; China military list designation; customers suspending relationships; U.S.-China biotech decoupling ongoing

title: Guardant Health Gains 13.82% on Cancer Screening News
headline: Guardant Health stock up 13.82% on multi-cancer blood screening development progress.
key_facts: GH +13.82% July 1, 2026; multi-cancer blood screening; Breakthrough Device Designation timing unclear

title: Enhertu PDUFA Decision Due July 7
headline: AstraZeneca/Daiichi Sankyo Enhertu faces FDA PDUFA decision July 7, 2026 for post-neoadjuvant HER2-positive early breast cancer expansion.
key_facts: PDUFA date July 7, 2026; HER2-positive early breast cancer post-neoadjuvant indication; AstraZeneca/Daiichi Sankyo
